chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.736 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 27.05.2025 Mr. Zahid Baladi, advocate, holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Nawaz, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Mr. Abdul Nabi Joyo, advocate for complainant ------------------------------------ Applicants/accused are present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned trial Court has furnished report, which reveals that case has been disposed of on 13.05.2025. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application has become infructuous, the same is accordingly dismissed. So far as the surety furnished in the instant criminal bail application is concerned, the same is no more required. Nazir is directed to return the surety to the Surety, upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
